variants.title: Donaldson P765728 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Mahle HC28
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P765728 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Mahle HC28
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P765728 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On provides dependable protection for hydraulic systems by efficiently removing particulates and contaminants. It ensures clean hydraulic fluid, promoting smooth operation and extending the lifespan of critical system components. With its easy-to-install spin-on design, this filter minimizes downtime and maintenance costs. Its durable construction and advanced filtration media make it a trusted choice for industrial and mobile hydraulic applications requiring reliable performance.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 136.0 mm, Length: 173.0 mm, Thread: 1 1/2"-16 UN 2B, Seal Material: Neoprene, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Seal: Neoprene

variants.title: Filtrec AWG117 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Mahle HC28
variants.option1Value: Filtrec AWG117 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Mahle HC28
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec AWG117. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the AWG117 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 136.0 mm, Length: 173.0 mm, Thread: 1 1/2"-16 UN 2B, Seal Material: Neoprene, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Seal: Neoprene

variants.title: Mann Filter W 1372/1 Hydraulics | Replaces the Mahle HC28
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter W 1372/1 Hydraulics | Replaces the Mahle HC28
variants.description: MANN-FILTER spin-on hydraulic filters offer maximum filtration performance and thus ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.
specifications: Style: Hydraulics, Dimension A: 135.0 mm, Dimension B: 101.0 mm, Dimension C: 111.0 mm, Dimension G: 1 1/2-16 UN-2B, Dimension H: 177.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 136.0 mm, Length: 173.0 mm, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Thread: 1 1/2"-16 UN 2B, Seal: Neoprene, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: Filtration Group 70541523 | Replaces the Mahle HC28
variants.option1Value: Filtration Group 70541523 | Replaces the Mahle HC28
variants.description: Our spin-on filters with glass fiber media (SMx) are used for filtration of hydraulic and lubricating oils for applications with the highest demands on fineness and service life. They are installed in both pressure and suction lines and ensure the protection of downstream components. Nominal size up to 150 - Equipped with our highly efficient glass fiber media - Long life filter due to very high dirt-holding capacity and differential pressure stability - Minimal pressure drop due to flow optimized  design of the components
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 136.0 mm, Length: 173.0 mm, Thread: 1 1/2"-16 UN 2B, Seal Material: Neoprene, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Seal: Neoprene

variants.title: Fleetguard HF40015 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Mahle HC28
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard HF40015 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Mahle HC28
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF40015 hydraulic spin-on filter with synthetic media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
